message:
test(robot): freeze cass api-version --json compatibility triple (ibuuh.36)

Sixth robot-mode JSON golden under the u9osp harness (and yet another
ibuuh.36 verification-matrix row): cass api-version --json returns
three fields — crate_version, api_version, contract_version — that
together tell a downstream agent 'am I talking to a compatible cass
build?' A silent bump of api_version or contract_version without a
coordinated client update breaks every agent using this handshake
without failing any existing test. Freezing here makes drift a CI
failure at commit time.

The golden is trivially small (three keys, crate_version scrubbed to
[VERSION]) but the invariant is load-bearing for the agent
compatibility contract.

VERIFICATION:
UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_robot_json → 5/5 pass.
3 consecutive stable re-runs → 5/5 each.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.36; bead stays
open for benchmark / crash-harness / rollout-gate rows still dependent
on upstream ibuuh.15 / ibuuh.17 work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+{
+  "crate_version": "[VERSION]",
+  "api_version": 1,
+  "contract_version": "1"
+}
\ No newline at end of file
